background: A study takes an SRS from a population of full-term infants. The standard deviation of birth weights in this population is 2 pounds.

task.query: Calculate 95% confidence intervals for μ for samples in which n=81 and \bar{x}=6.1 pounds.
Calculate 95% confidence intervals for μ for samples in which n=36 and \bar{x}=7.0 pounds.
Calculate 95% confidence intervals for μ for samples in which n=9 and \bar{x}=5.8 pounds.

meta info.caption: Newborn weight.
meta info.section: 10.2 Confidence Intervals for $\mu$ When $\sigma$ Is Known
